note: Performance ratchet baselines. Gates fail when current > baseline * (1 + tolerancePct/100). When a fix lands that meaningfully lowers a metric, lower its baseline in the same PR to lock the win in. Initial values measured 2026-07-04 (pnpm --filter canvas-workspace build, includes perf instrumentation).
runtimeNote: Counter gates for perf:scenarios (deterministic, node-count independent). typing.nodes-array-replace ratcheted 132 → 10 after B1 fixed I-1 (200ms editor writeback debounce): measured 3 replacements for 120 keys (was 121), frames>20ms 43% → 1.2%, INP p95 48 → 32ms. drag still ~1 replacement per pointer-move (A2, fix is B7 in Sprint 3). Timing metrics (INP/frames/LoAF) stay informational — per-machine.
